ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fights" (
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fight */,
  "blue_athlete" TEXT /* Name of the blue athlete */,
  "blue_score" INTEGER /* Score for the blue athlete */,
  "white_score" INTEGER /* Score for the white athlete */,
  "white_athlete" TEXT /* Name of the white athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event where the fight took place */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fight */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the fight (e.g., Quarterfinal, Semifinal) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the fight (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of victory (e.g., Ippon, Waza-ari, Decision) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the fight in minutes */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "blue_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the blue athlete */,
  "white_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the white athlete */,
  "blue_ranking" INTEGER /* Rank of the blue athlete at the time of the fight */,
  "white_ranking" INTEGER /* Rank of the white athlete at the time of the fight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_blue_athlete FOREIGN KEY ("blue_athlete") REFERENCES athletes ("name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fights_white_athlete FOREIGN KEY ("white_athlete") REFERENCES athletes ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Grand Slam) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the event's official website */,
  "number_of_athletes" INTEGER /* Number of athletes participating in the event */,
  "number_of_fights" INTEGER /* Total number of fights in the event */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "weight_class" TEXT /* Weight class of the athlete (e.g., -63kg) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country representing the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "current_ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the athlete */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete started their professional career */,
  "career_high_ranking" INTEGER /* Highest ranking achieved by the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach associated with the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_points" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking point record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete receiving ranking points */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded to the athlete */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date when the points were awarded */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event where the points were awarded */,
  "fight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific fight where the points were earned */,
  "previous_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the athlete before the points were awarded */,
  "new_ranking" INTEGER /* New ranking of the athlete after the points were awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_points_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_points_fight_id FOREIGN KEY ("fight_id") REFERENCES fights ("fight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the athlete being coached */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or qualifications of the coach */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
